author: barnabasbusa
content: Is there a reason we don't have execution-apis releases similar to how we have eels tests and consensus spec releases? Would be easier to keep track of which specific release we target for a specific devnet.

author: m.kalinin
content: we used to have releases before, but they were attached to hard forks. not sure if anyone has capacity to do releases at a higher pace. won't commit work?

author: mysticryuujin
content: execution-api releases are work in progress mostly by the OpenRPC team, working on docs, artifacts, and CI for versioning.
